criteria_verification.criterion_text: `resume_value_as[T](typ: type[T], raw: T | dict | Any) -> T` defined as a generic function
criteria_verification.evidence: src/forge/adapters/langgraph/__init__.py defines `T = TypeVar('T', bound=BaseModel)` and `def resume_value_as(typ: type[T], raw: T | dict[str, Any] | Any) -> T:` — generic over any Pydantic model.
criteria_verification.notes: src/forge/adapters/langgraph/__init__.py defines `T = TypeVar('T', bound=BaseModel)` and `def resume_value_as(typ: type[T], raw: T | dict[str, Any] | Any) -> T:` — generic over any Pydantic model.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `isinstance(raw, typ)` short-circuit returns `raw` unchanged (no-op in direct-invoke mode)
criteria_verification.evidence: First branch in resume_value_as: `if isinstance(raw, typ): return raw`. Verified by TestDirectInvokeShortCircuit.test_typed_input_is_returned_by_identity (asserts `result is original`, identity not equality) and test_typed_input_subclass_short_circuits.
criteria_verification.notes: First branch in resume_value_as: `if isinstance(raw, typ): return raw`. Verified by TestDirectInvokeShortCircuit.test_typed_input_is_returned_by_identity (asserts `result is original`, identity not equality) and test_typed_input_subclass_short_circuits.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Otherwise calls `typ.model_validate(raw)` (Pydantic v2) and returns the result
criteria_verification.evidence: Second branch: `if isinstance(raw, dict): return typ.model_validate(raw)`. Verified by TestServerModeDictRehydration.test_dict_input_is_rehydrated_to_typed_instance and test_dict_input_with_invalid_field_raises_validation_error.
criteria_verification.notes: Second branch: `if isinstance(raw, dict): return typ.model_validate(raw)`. Verified by TestServerModeDictRehydration.test_dict_input_is_rehydrated_to_typed_instance and test_dict_input_with_invalid_field_raises_validation_error.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Raises a clear `TypeError` for inputs that are neither `typ` nor `dict`-like
criteria_verification.evidence: Third branch raises TypeError with message including expected type, actual type, and bounded repr of raw. Verified by TestRejectsUnsupportedInputs parametrised across int/str/None/list/object — each asserts the message contains 'ApprovalResponsePayload' and 'dict'.
criteria_verification.notes: Third branch raises TypeError with message including expected type, actual type, and bounded repr of raw. Verified by TestRejectsUnsupportedInputs parametrised across int/str/None/list/object — each asserts the message contains 'ApprovalResponsePayload' and 'dict'.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Group D `Scenario Outline`** parametrised contract test: same caller code observes a typed `ApprovalResponsePayload` whether the input was a typed instance or a bare mapping of equivalent content
criteria_verification.evidence: test_group_d_scenario_outline_caller_code_is_mode_agnostic uses @pytest.mark.parametrize over (typed_direct_invoke, dict_server_mode) and asserts identical attribute access (.decision/.decided_by/.request_id) succeeds for both input shapes.
criteria_verification.notes: test_group_d_scenario_outline_caller_code_is_mode_agnostic uses @pytest.mark.parametrize over (typed_direct_invoke, dict_server_mode) and asserts identical attribute access (.decision/.decided_by/.request_id) succeeds for both input shapes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Direct-invoke test: typed input is returned unchanged (identity check, not just equality)
Server-mode test: `dict` input round-trips through `model_validate` and produces an equivalent typed instance
criteria_verification.evidence: TestServerModeDictRehydration.test_dict_input_is_rehydrated_to_typed_instance constructs a dict payload, calls resume_value_as, asserts the result is an ApprovalResponsePayload with the same field values; test_dict_input_produces_new_instance_not_input verifies it is a fresh instance.
criteria_verification.notes: TestServerModeDictRehydration.test_dict_input_is_rehydrated_to_typed_instance constructs a dict payload, calls resume_value_as, asserts the result is an ApprovalResponsePayload with the same field values; test_dict_input_produces_new_instance_not_input verifies it is a fresh instance.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: CI grep guard (`tests/integration/test_rehydration_guard.py` or similar): scan `forge/` for `interrupt(...)` followed by `.decision` / `.responder` attribute access in the same function without an intervening `resume_value_as`; fail the test if found
criteria_verification.evidence: test_rehydration_grep_guard_no_unhelpered_interrupt_attribute_access walks every src/forge/**/*.py via ast.parse, locates Call nodes with func name 'interrupt', flags Attribute nodes named .decision/.responder later in the same function unless an intervening resume_value_as Call exists or # noqa: rehydration-guard is on the line. Confidence tests (test_rehydration_grep_guard_detects_synthetic_violation, ...respects_allowlist_directive, ...accepts_helpered_access) prove the scanner detects, allow-lists, and accepts the helpered path correctly. AST-based scanning means docstring/comment mentions are ignored — only real code paths are inspected.
criteria_verification.notes: test_rehydration_grep_guard_no_unhelpered_interrupt_attribute_access walks every src/forge/**/*.py via ast.parse, locates Call nodes with func name 'interrupt', flags Attribute nodes named .decision/.responder later in the same function unless an intervening resume_value_as Call exists or # noqa: rehydration-guard is on the line. Confidence tests (test_rehydration_grep_guard_detects_synthetic_violation, ...respects_allowlist_directive, ...accepts_helpered_access) prove the scanner detects, allow-lists, and accepts the helpered path correctly. AST-based scanning means docstring/comment mentions are ignored — only real code paths are inspected.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Module imports nothing from `nats_core` or `nats-py` (only `langgraph` types if needed)
criteria_verification.evidence: TestModuleImportPurity.test_langgraph_adapter_does_not_import_nats_core uses ast.walk to inspect actual Import / ImportFrom nodes in src/forge/adapters/langgraph/__init__.py, asserting no import has root 'nats_core' or 'nats'. The module's only third-party import is `from pydantic import BaseModel`.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Conditionally approved — test collection errors in independent verification. All Player quality gates passed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 360 chars provided.

- ASSIGNS_TASK_TO
- HAS_FIELD
